lines.text: So that's the control desk, seven screens that run the entire corridor.
Overview shows you the money and the jobs, and the Jobs desk is where you action the three gates.
Ground Force is your boots on the ground, and Verification keeps every supplier vetted.
Team controls access, Notifications keep the record, and the Ledger settles every shilling.
Every gate you hold protects both the client and the supplier, that is the whole job.
You bring the discipline, the platform brings the structure. Welcome to Nguzo HQ.
